name_en: M81153 Grey New Aerogram Brazza wallet emphasizes the delicate texture of grained calfskin, with metal letters discreetly branded for identity. Dividers and card slots hold bills, documents, and coins, pairing well with Aerogram series handbags. Dimensions: 10 x 19 x 2 cm
